'''Saldith''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]], Saldith was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]; eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] after years of study and service. As a Master, Saldith took on a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] named [[Sha Koon]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Training the young [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]] to temper her strong connection to the Force, Saldith discovered that Koon could play an important role in the ongoing [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]; a conflict in which her uncle [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] actively participated in. Knowing that the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] had lost touch with the Jedi in the field, Master Saldith presented Koon as a way of contacting the wayward Jedi. Confident in her Force abilities and her connection with her uncle, the Ithorian and the Council members bolstered Koon's strength to successfully reach out to Jedi Koon during the fighting.<ref name="SHW" />
